description_long: This is a rounded, white ceramic cup with a wide opening and a single, circular handle attached to one side. On the front, it features a large, bold black letter 'P', while the back displays the word 'Poulsen' in black text with a stylized gold and black 'P' logo. The cup has a smooth, matte finish and a slightly bulbous shape, making it appear sturdy and comfortable to hold. The base is subtly flattened to provide stability when placed on surfaces. There are no visible decorative patterns aside from the branding elements, and the interior is plain and unadorned.
description: A white, rounded ceramic cup with a single handle, featuring bold 'P' branding and the word 'Poulsen' on opposite sides. The surface is smooth and matte, with a sturdy, bulbous form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black 'P' logo and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered and minimal visible branding.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the 'Poulsen' text and stylized 'P' logo, with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible branding or handle, showing the plain white surface.
